summary: SRC 3: Creates fn_promote_emission(uuid) for atomic single-row promotion (lock→validate STAGED→mint CID→fn_process_cid→SID+MID→PROMOTED) and fn_promote_emission_batch(int) for deterministic batch promotion with count. Error paths: log → update status → RETURN clean. No RAISE after state mutation. Batch wrapper uses return-state logic, no exception control flow. Adapts to existing Phase 2A schema (status/STAGED instead of ingest_status/RECEIVED). 9 enforcement tests across 4 categories.

payload.atomic_flow: Lock → validate STAGED → INSERT cid_intake → fn_process_cid() → SID + MID → status = PROMOTED
payload.error_flow: Log lcs_errors → UPDATE emission status (REJECTED/ERROR) → RETURN clean
payload.correctness_fix: Removed all RAISE EXCEPTION after error logging. Batch wrapper uses return-state logic instead of EXCEPTION block. Error state is never rolled back.
payload.schema_adaptation: WP referenced ingest_status/RECEIVED; adapted to existing status/STAGED from Phase 2A
